title: Circulated Letters in MCF year 2020
contentHtml:
Circulated Letters in MCF Year 2020
PS No. Sub. Railway Board/Other Railway Letter No. Date circulated letter in MCF on date  Download 
13/2020 Vacancy Notice no. 22/2020 (R). 2020/CRIS/NDLS-IIQ/Pers/Estt./3276/Pt.I 23.11.2020 14.12.2020 View / Download
12/2020. Retention of Railway quarter on transfer, deputation, retirement etc E(G)2000 QR 1-23 24.11.2020 04.12.2020 View / Download
11/2020. Continuation of issuance o Manual Pass to Railway Employees PC-VII/2020/HRMS/6(Part) 17.11.2020 01.12.2020 View / Download
10/2020. Minimum rates of wages and variable dearness allowance w.e.f. 01.10.2020 2020/E(LL)/AT/MW/2 29.10.2020 23.11.2020 View / Download
09/2020. Promotion and Publicity of newly launched IRCTC SBI RuPay 2020/TG-1/RuPay Card 01.09.2020 01.09.2020 08.09.2020 View / Download
08/2020. Impersonation as Member Railway Board-misuse by anonymous person E No.2020/O&M/3/3 20.06.2020 15.07.2020 View / Download
07/2020. Online Training on Indian Railways E(MPP)/2020/3/15 19.06.2020 26.06.2020 View / Download
06/2020. Extension of validity of Passes/PTSs consequent to national lockdown to prevent the spread of COVID-19 E(W)2020/PS5-2/7 15.06.2020 15.06.2020 View / Download
05/2020. On-line Pre-selection Training to SC/ST Candidates for Selections held for promotion to Group ‘B’ posts E(GP)2010/2/39 05.06.2020 06.06.2020 View / Download
04/2020. Coverage under Railway Services (Provision) rules, 1993, in place of National Pension System of those Railway employees whose selection for appointment was finalized before 01.01.2004, but who joined Railway services on or after 01.01.2004 D-43/12/2018-F(E)III 03.03.2020 14.05.2020 View / Download
03/2020. Amendment to sub-rule (3) (i) & (ii) of Rule 13 and sub-rule (4) of Rule 13 of Railway Service (Conduct) Rule, 1966 E(D&A)2020 GS1-1 06.03.2020 16.03.2020 View / Download
02/2020. Removal of age limit of 25 years of medical facilities for dependent children of serving Railway employees and pensioners 2008/H-1/2/15  25.02.2020 09.03.2020 View / Download
01/2020. Grant of Special Casual Leave to the Railway employees for mountaineering/training cum trekking expeditions for 30 days in calendar year. E(G)/2019/LE-1/9 26.12.2019 07.01.2020 View / Download
